raw.message: 'Damn fun.' 'Wonderful mechanics.' 'A standout in this crowded mobile fighting genre.' - TouchArcade

hook.summary: Rapid character selection and transformation showcase.
hook.visual_action: A hand taps on characters Double, Painwheel, and Beowulf, triggering their unique transformation animations.

scene_flow: Rapid-fire character selection showing different fighters and their transformations.
Transition to a person holding a phone playing the game (Beowulf vs Squigly).
Gameplay montage showing combos and special moves.
Final end card with the game logo and a 'Play Now' button.
audience_proxy: Fans of fighting games and anime-style art, likely males 18-35.
